# Copilot Instructions for IELTS Reading Mock System

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

## Project Overview
This is an IELTS Reading Mock Test System built with React, TypeScript, and Vite. The system provides comprehensive IELTS reading practice with various question types, timing, and scoring features.

## Key Features
- Interactive reading test interface with 60-minute timer
- Multiple question types: Multiple Choice, True/False/Not Given, Matching headings, Gap filling, Short answers, Matching information
- Automatic scoring and band calculation
- User progress tracking and analytics
- Responsive design for desktop and mobile

## Code Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for all components and utilities
- Follow React functional components with hooks
- Implement proper error handling and loading states
- Use semantic HTML for accessibility
- Follow IELTS test format standards
- Maintain clean, modular code structure
- Use proper TypeScript interfaces for data models

## Specific Instructions
- When creating test components, ensure they follow IELTS official test format
- Implement proper timer functionality with auto-submit
- Use appropriate scoring algorithms based on IELTS band descriptors
- Ensure all question types are properly implemented according to IELTS standards
- Focus on user experience suitable for test-taking environment
- Implement proper data validation for test submissions
